sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, name String);
SELECT id, positionUTF8(name, 'r') AS position FROM test_strings WHERE positionUTF8(name, 'r') > 0;
UPDATE test_strings SET name = concat(name, ' - Band') WHERE positionUTF8(name, 'r') > 0;
SELECT id, name FROM test_strings WHERE positionUTF8(name, 'M') = 1;
